calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-15-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Set For Trial On Sep-14-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stanley Shen, Esq., 415-661-6700, appearing for Guang Hun Huang, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Walter McMath, Esq., NO CARD PROVIDED.

ARGUED. Mr. McMath presented oral argument in support of his position, requested that the court grant the demurrer and requested that the court take judical notice of the photographs of the sidewalk. The Court granted the request to take judicial notice.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs PAUL ANCAJIMA and MINNIE LAU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action alleged in this complaint are not barred the statute of limitations (starting on the date of the slip and fall); are not barred by res judicata and are not subject to abatement. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
